ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly version of the title */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full content of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the article belongs */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL of the project or article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  "status" TEXT /* Publication status of the article (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "read_time" INTEGER /* Estimated reading time of the article in minutes */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the article was last updated */,
  "is_trending" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the article is trending */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the author's account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the author's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the article */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was viewed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geolocation of the user viewing the article */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to view the article (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reader, subscriber, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment is flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tag_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tag_associations_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tag_associations_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES article_tags ("tag_id")
)
